EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IXMLWriter2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the sequential writing of XML.

[Guid("034900A2-4DB4-4074-8A7B-3A0885B844A2")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IXMLWriter2 : IXMLWriter

Properties

Stream

Obtains underlying stream. If WriteTo() is not called yet, will return NULL.

IStream Stream { get; }

Property Value

IStream
